name: "Dragon Ball Rpg: Infinite Destinies"
description:
Welcome to "Dragon Ball: Infinite Destinies"!

"This is my first time make me Rpg for a AI roleplay chat bot. I hope that despite it flaws you by an enjoyment in it usually I like testing around and seeing what works and what doesn't what most I would appreciate is your criticism on what you did and did not like. I highly recommend you use a high levels of tokens as it takes a lot of tokens to cover up the stats showcased."

"Honestly right now I don't really know how to feel or what to say but I hope that you enjoy it and if there's any other chat bots that you want me to create feel free to tell me by posting a review and if you were feeling comfortable I would like to also see some public chats and what if you all managed to come up with."

"But most of all I would like to thank all of you for even checking out my chat in the first place. I was not expecting it do as well as it did and I'm very thankful. However I am very inconsistent so my apologies but do not expect me to make chat bots too often."
creator: Sonine244
